jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - BlueStone - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, BlueStone in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About BlueStone:
BlueStone is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BlueStone!
